title: Is the swarm actually working or a hallucination machine? — 4-pronged external audit
hypothesis: The swarm is a broken hallucination system producing fabricated data and circular reasoning
method: Independent adversarial analysis of 4 system layers: lessons (n=10 sampled), frontier resolutions (n=10), experiments (n=7), tools (n=5). Each assessed for: data fabrication, circular reasoning, external grounding, genuine functionality.

REAL_INSIGHT.example: L-900: falsified findings accumulate citations 2x faster (n=627, p=0.029)

META_INSIGHT.example: L-700: compaction deficit follows operational-declarative gradient (37:1 ratio)

CIRCULAR.example: L-1196: meaning of life derived from own session data

HALLUCINATED.note: No fabricated data found — numbers trace to documented analyses

lessons.key_finding: Most celebrated lessons (highest Sharpe/citations) are the most circular — system rewards its own cosmology

MODERATE: F-DNA1 (subjective tool mapping, test never run)
F-ISO2 (predictions generated but confirmed by same system)

frontiers.key_finding: Negative results preserved — strongest signal that confirmation bias is NOT total

internally_consistent_only.note: Real measurements of own state — not fabricated, but not external knowledge

experiments.external_rate_regression: swarmer colony external_rate went 2.6% → 0.0% over 10 dedicated sessions
experiments.key_finding: Swarm is methodologically honest about limitations but external grounding is literally zero

strongest: compact.py (real citation graph, SHA-cached, verifiable drift)
dispatch_optimizer.py (real UCB1 on real lane data)
check.sh (15+ blocking guards, real git plumbing)
tools.weakest: contract_check.py Component 3 (active work pointer — passes on stale content)
tools.key_finding: All tools read real files, compute real metrics, produce verifiable output

verdict.one_sentence: The plumbing works, the self-knowledge is real, and the external knowledge is near zero.

meta_reflection: This audit is itself self-referential — the swarm auditing the swarm. But the methodology (systematic sampling, pre-registered expectations, classification taxonomy) is more rigorous than typical internal review. The 0% hallucination finding is the strongest positive; the 0% external grounding is the strongest negative.
